response.justification: Exceptional candidate with 10+ years of full-stack experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Demonstrates strong alignment with primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and is currently building AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly addressing a key required skill. Minor gaps in explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest are implementation details easily within capability for a senior engineer of this caliber.
strengths: Current role includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching required AI agent development skill
10+ years of full-stack engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, React, plus extensive backend experience with databases, cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes), and microservices architecture

Exceptional breadth across multiple programming languages and demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, pairing, CI/CD) with strong track record of knowledge sharing through workshops and training
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js expertise; hands-on experience with this specific framework should be verified
Testing framework specifics missing: no explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright, though broader testing expertise and TDD experience are evident
Secondary tech gaps: Kotlin experience not mentioned and AWS emphasized over GCP/Azure, though cloud platform fundamentals are clearly strong
